column8: Gordon? I think he_______________(write) a letter at the moment.
column9: Yes, the match is on TV now, but we_______________(lose).
column10: Right now, Margaret______________(have) a shower. Do you want to ring later?
column11: Sally_______________(stay) with her aunt for a few days.
column12: I____________(lie)! It's true! I did see Madonna at the supermarket.
column13: Josh______________(always/use) my bike! It's so annoying.
column14: We_____________(have) lunch, but I can come round and help you later.
column15: ___________________(you/play) music up there? It's really noisy!
